faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Lindenhurst?
faqs.answer: Lindenhurst residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally yellow sac spiders. While most are harmless, they can reproduce quickly and create unsightly webs throughout your property. Our treatments target all common species found in Long Island homes.
